MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARLENE HELFRICH FOR PLAINTIFF CHARLES GLASS. ROBERTA KIMMEL, OFF SITE MANAGER PRESENT.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY WENDY LILLIEDOLL FOR DEFENDANT DANIEL SCHCOLNIK

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF JUDMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT DANIEL SCHCOLNIK FOR POSSESSION OF 2300 PACIFIC AVE #412 AND FOR A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $5515 ($2200 MAY AND JUNE RENT, 1400 SECURITY DEPOSIT, 515 COSTS, AND 1400 ATTORNEY FEES). EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION STAYED IF DEFENDANT PAYS PROPERY MANAGER IN #406 AS FOLLOWS: 6/30/03 $1000 APPLIED TOWARDS JUDGMENT; 7/1/05 $1100 JULY RENT, 7/31/05 $1200 TOWARDS JUDGMENT, 8/1/05 $1100 AUG RENT, 8/3/05 $1400 TOWARDS JUDGMENT, 8/31/05 $400 BALANCE TOWARDS JUDGMENT. IF DEFENDANT MAKES LAST PAYMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RECEIPT OF PAYMENT.IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT, NO FURTHER NOTICE OR STAYS. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN JUDGMENT WITH COPY EMAILED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WILL HAVE 2 DAYS TO RESPOND.

JUDGE PRO TEM:TIELA CHALMERS ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: LAVON GRANGER (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
